response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal music from 00:00 to 01:44 phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Connect'. 2. JSON Usage: Lyrics reference was used for the song portion; the conversation from 02:16 onwards was manually transcribed and translated as the JSON lacked dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal bursts. Transitions between song lines are instantaneous where appropriate. The long instrumental break (00:28-01:00) remains silent per instructions.

subtitles.original: きっと奇跡はおこせるだろう
subtitles.english: Then I can certainly create a miracle, right?

subtitles.original: 交わした約束忘れないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget the promise we made

subtitles.original: 目を閉じ確かめる
subtitles.english: I'll close my eyes and ascertain it

subtitles.original: 押し寄せた闇 振り払って進むよ
subtitles.english: Shaking off the darkness that closed in on me, I advance on

subtitles.original: どんなに大きな壁があっても 越えてみせるからきっと
subtitles.english:
Because no matter how great of a wall there is
I'll show you I'll overcome it, so I'll certainly

subtitles.original: 明日信じて祈って
subtitles.english: Believe in tomorrow and pray

subtitles.original: 壊れた世界で彷徨って私は
subtitles.english: Wandering through this broken world, I...

subtitles.original: 引き寄せられるように辿り着いた
subtitles.english: ...reached it as though I was drawn towards it

subtitles.original: 目覚めた心は走り出した未来を描くため
subtitles.english:
My awoken heart has started to run
in order to draw the future

subtitles.original: 難しい道で立ち止まっても
subtitles.english: Even if I come to a standstill on a difficult road

subtitles.original: 空はきれいな青さでいつも待っててくれる
subtitles.english: The sky is always waiting for me in a beautiful blue

subtitles.original: だから怖くない
subtitles.english: So I'm not scared

subtitles.original: もう何があっても挫けない
subtitles.english: By now, no matter what happens, I won't get disheartened

subtitles.original: ずっと明日待って
subtitles.english: Forever waiting for tomorrow

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: I'm so excited! Oh, happy birthday!
subtitles.english: I'm so excited! Oh, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you, Raora! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, Raora! Thank you!

subtitles.original: I'm so excited for you! It's your first 3D birthday live!
subtitles.english: I'm so excited for you! It's your first 3D birthday live!

subtitles.original: It is! And look at us with our... cool outfit!
subtitles.english: It is! And look at us with our... cool outfit!

subtitles.original: I know! We are so pretty! We are so gorgeous!
subtitles.english: I know! We are so pretty! We are so gorgeous!

subtitles.original: So cool! Ah, I'm so cool!
subtitles.english: So cool! Ah, I'm so cool!

subtitles.original: You are!
subtitles.english: You are!

subtitles.original: I am so cool!
subtitles.english: I am so cool!

subtitles.original:
And you know, because you're so cool,
I want to give you a beautiful color that I think would suit you.
subtitles.english:
And you know, because you're so cool,
I want to give you a beautiful color that I think would suit you.

subtitles.original: Me?
subtitles.english: Me?

subtitles.original: Yes.
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: Which color? Pink? Is it going to be pink?
subtitles.english: Which color? Pink? Is it going to be pink?

subtitles.original: Um, it's... if you look at your eyes, your beautiful yellow eyes...
subtitles.english: Um, it's... if you look at your eyes, your beautiful yellow eyes...

subtitles.original: They... they have curiosity and playfulness.
subtitles.english: They... they have curiosity and playfulness.

subtitles.original: And I think it suits you.
subtitles.english: And I think it suits you.

subtitles.original: And so I would like to give this color, this beautiful color around us.
subtitles.english: And so I would like to give this color, this beautiful color around us.

subtitles.original: Which color?
subtitles.english: Which color?

subtitles.original: Are you colorblind?
subtitles.english: Are you colorblind?

subtitles.original: Hey! Kronii! You've been bullying me on my birthday!
subtitles.english: Hey! Kronii! You've been bullying me on my birthday!

subtitles.original: You're supposed to be nice to me!
subtitles.english: You're supposed to be nice to me!

subtitles.original: No, I mean your beautiful yellow eyes...
subtitles.english: No, I mean your beautiful yellow eyes...

subtitles.original: Ah!
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: It's beautiful! It's like...
subtitles.english: It's beautiful! It's like...

subtitles.original:
Why, on my birthday, instead of giving me a gift, you come here,
you sing and dance with me, and then you just start bullying me?
subtitles.english:
Why, on my birthday, instead of giving me a gift, you come here,
you sing and dance with me, and then you just start bullying me?

subtitles.original: You know what? Get out of here!
subtitles.english: You know what? Get out of here!

subtitles.original: I complimented you!
subtitles.english: I complimented you!

subtitles.original: I complimented you! Golden! Golden eyes! Is that beautiful?
subtitles.english: I complimented you! Golden! Golden eyes! Is that beautiful?

subtitles.original: So it's kind of like yellow, right?
subtitles.english: So it's kind of like yellow, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: So, what does it mean? Why you give me this color to me?
subtitles.english: So, what does it mean? Why you give me this color to me?

subtitles.original: I... like... I just said! Curiosity and playfulness!
subtitles.english: I... like... I just said! Curiosity and playfulness!

subtitles.original: Stop it! Are you even listening to me?
subtitles.english: Stop it! Are you even listening to me?

subtitles.original: I'm not listening!
subtitles.english: I'm not listening!

subtitles.original: You're not paying attention to me! You don't care about me!
subtitles.english: You're not paying attention to me! You don't care about me!

subtitles.original: My head... you talk too much! My head...
subtitles.english: My head... you talk too much! My head...

subtitles.original: I think you should keep up your dream.
subtitles.english: I think you should keep up your dream.

subtitles.original: I have a question.
subtitles.english: I have a question.

subtitles.original: OK, I have an answer.
subtitles.english: OK, I have an answer.

subtitles.original: Like, I was expecting like... blue coming from you.
subtitles.english: Like, I was expecting like... blue coming from you.

subtitles.original: Oh...
subtitles.english: Oh...
